memory-store.note: Required. Provides checkin, recall, record, and report-issue so GTM Agent can use company memory and record campaign learning.

exa.note: Recommended for company research, people search, public-web source discovery, evidence fetches, and structured lead generation. Lead generation requires an Exa API key configured in the host MCP config, typically as an x-api-key header; do not commit real keys.

websets.note: Recommended for verified account/contact sets, enrichments, imports, and async sourcing. Replace YOUR_EXA_API_KEY in the host MCP config before use.
